name: factory-droid
description: Factory Droid adapter for VEX agents, skills, and rules.

agents.notes: Copies VEX agent markdown files into Factory Droid agents directory.

skills.notes: Copies VEX skill directories into Factory Droid skills directory.

rules.notes: Copies VEX rule packs into Factory Droid rules directory.

hooks.notes: Factory Droid hook integration is not defined in this adapter.

commands.notes: Slash command translation is not defined in this adapter.

contexts.notes: Context template translation is not defined in this adapter.

install.notes: Installs VEX agents, skills, and rules using Factory Droid directory layout. Use dry-run before writing files.
